name: Маска Свечи
notes: The Candle's Mask of the Defense of the First Adit: the lamp-warden who lit the tunnel and burned the raiders' ladders. The current bearer is a human alchemist from Kragmir's academy quarter, name never announced. She covers the ramps with fire flasks, blinding flash charges, and walls of smoke; her mask carries smoked-glass lenses. Glass cannon: high Reflex, thin HP, and a human's eyes, so she keeps the light where she needs it.

strikes.name: magnesium flash
strikes.text: On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 minute, and on a critical failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round instead. Spends one Magnesium Flash.

actions.name: Quick Bomber
actions.text: Маска Свечи Interacts to draw a bomb, then Strikes with it.

actions.name: Smoke Veil
actions.text: Маска Свечи throws a smoke ball up to 10 feet. Smoke fills a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] for 1 minute; creatures inside the smoke are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] (вручную: поставить и убрать шаблон дыма). Spends one Smoke Ball (Greater).

description.value:
Activate 1 Strike

A lamp-warden's magnesium charge, thrown up to 20 feet. It deals @Damage[(1d6)[fire]] damage and 1 fire splash damage. On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 minute, and on a critical failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round instead.
